title: Appendix #A-2 ORS AFT Search Fields
body_text:
Appendix #A-2	ORS AFT Search Fields
Search Field
Description
Format
Instructions
Transit
Route and Transit Number
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is All in drop-down list
ГўВЂВ“ Select a single transit to narrow down search
Account
Full account number including account type
Text box,
1ГўВЂВ“14 digits
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњacct1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific account number
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњacct1-acct2ГўВЂВќ to search for range of accounts
ГўВЂВ“ Use wildcard ГўВЂВњ%ГўВЂВќ to search by membership number (Example: %123456 to search for items with membership number of 123456)
From
Date item is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Calendar icon
ГўВЂВ“ Select the calendar icon to select date from calendar
ГўВЂВ“ Select date by selecting day of month in calendar
To
Date item is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Calendar icon
ГўВЂВ“ Select the calendar icon to select date from calendar
ГўВЂВ“ Set focus to From or To by selecting the text box
ГўВЂВ“ Select date by selecting day of month in calendar
ГўВЂВ“ Select the calendar icon again to close calendar
Amount
Dollar amount of item
Text box,
1ГўВЂВ“8 digit dollar amount + ГўВЂВњ.ГўВЂВќ + 2 digit cents
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњamnt1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific dollar value.
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњamnt1-ГўВЂВќ to search for specific dollar value and over
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњ-amnt1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific dollar value and under
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњamnt1-amnt2ГўВЂВќ to search for range of dollar values
Currency
Currency
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is All
ГўВЂВ“ Other options are CAD (Canadian) and USD (US)
Item Trace #
Item Trace #
Numeric
Text box,
22 digits
ГўВЂВ“ Insert entire 22 digit item trace # to locate AFT transaction
Return Reference #
Return Reference #
Text box,
1ГўВЂВ“9 digits
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњref1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific reference #
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњref1-ГўВЂВќ to search for specific reference # and over
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњ-ref1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific reference # and under
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњref1-ref2ГўВЂВќ to search for range of reference #s
AFT Type
AFT type
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is All
ГўВЂВ“ Other options are Debit and Credit
